problem id: 2bb09a3e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(5)

examples:
  11000111 -> 00010110
  10100111 -> 10001111
  11111110 -> 10111111
  00011110 -> 00000000
  10001011 -> 00110101
  01010000 -> 10101011
  11011010 -> 00100111
  11001110 -> 01110110
  00001011 -> 00010001
  01111000 -> 00000011

query: 11010001
predicted answer: 11001111
